ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Fabii Paulini Utinensis Philosophi, et Graecas literas Venetiis profitensis, Hebdomades
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Sive Septem de Septenario libri, habiti in Uranicorum Academia In unius Vergilii versus explicatione. Ad Sereniss. Venetae Reip. Collegium. Cum privilegiis
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
